entry.title: A Million-Panel Project - NASA Science
entry.summary: Utah’s new solar power and battery storage facility is among the largest in the region.

entry.title: Curiosity Blog, Sols 4954–4960: Celebrating Our Rover Engineers Past and Present - NASA Science
entry.summary: Written by Lucy Thompson, Senior Research Scientist, University of New Brunswick, Canada

entry.title: Expedition 75 - NASA
entry.summary: Expedition 75 begins on July 26, 2026, and will end in spring 2027. The crew will welcome the SpaceX Crew-13 mission in late summer while exploring in-space manufacturing techniques, augmented reality and artificial intelligence methods for crew health checks, and bioprinting human tissue.

entry.title: Expedition 75 News Releases - NASA
entry.summary: Stay up-to-date with the latest science experiments and mission updates during the Expedition 75 mission aboard the International Space Station.

entry.title: Expedition 75 Image Gallery
entry.summary: Expedition 75 image gallery shows photographs taken by the crew from aboard the International Space Station of its mission and science activities, including the Earth below.

entry.title: Lucia S. Tsaoussi, Ph.D. - NASA Science
entry.summary: Dr. Tsaoussi serves as the Program Manager for NASA’s Space Geodesy program

entry.title: Eric N. Becker - NASA
entry.summary: Eric N. Becker is the chief engineer at NASA’s Armstrong Flight Research Center in Edwards, California. Appointed to the position in May 2026, he promotes,

entry.title: NASA Langley Research Center PolCube Information Site - NASA
entry.summary: What is PolCube? The proposed PolCube mission is an international collaboration between NASA Langley Research Center and the Korea Astronomy and Space Science Institute (KASI).

entry.title: Look for NASA+ Now Streaming on Amazon Fire TV - NASA
entry.summary: Continuing agency efforts to bring space closer to home, NASA+ is heading to more streaming platforms. On Thursday, NASA announced its programming is on Fire

entry.title: Science and Spacesuit Work Before Crew Changes Commanders - NASA
entry.summary: The International Space Station will change commanders on Saturday before three Expedition 74 crew members return to Earth on Sunday. As the homebound trio prepares for departure, the rest of the orbital crewmates is keeping up microgravity research and checking out spacewalking gear.
